title: cymbopogon annamensis
intro: Cymbopogon annamensis is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of lemongrass. This plant is native to Southeast Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cymbopogon annamensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, due to its high content of essential oils and bioactive compounds. Cymbopogon annamensis can be consumed as a herbal tea, used in aromatherapy, or applied topically in the form of essential oil or infusion to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
